title: Monsters, Guns And Dinosaurs
description: Monsters, Guns AND Dinosaurs! What more could you want in a Modpack?
body:
## Archived
- Please note this Modpack has been archived, this means it is no longer actively maintained. Although the files are still likely to work, they will not be updated.

![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS/BH_MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS_Header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS/BH_MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS_Promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS/BH_MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS_Overview.webp)
---
**Monsters, Guns And Dinosaurs** is a fantasy themed modpack filled with monsters, dragons, guns and danger. Enjoy a world filled with mythical beasts, prehistoric creatures, automatic weapons and more! Go wild in your world, these lands are filled with mystery and adventure, built with fantasy in mind, enjoy a peformance steady playthrough with quality-of-life mods in tow.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/funguns)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/funguns)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS/BH_MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS_Features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Pack A Punch** - Time to lock and load with TacZ.
- [✔️] **Monsters Nd More** - Mutant monsters and Mowzies mobs patrol these lands, but don't worry the skies are always watching you!
- [✔️] **Past In The Present** - What's this, somethings roaring across the lands, perhaps being cautious is a good idea, a clash with times titans is never a good idea.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS/BH_MONSTERS_GUNS_DINOSAURS_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
